mapper.select: SELECT * FROM intent_step ORDER BY priority ASC
SELECT * FROM intent_step WHERE intent_id = #{intentId} ORDER BY priority ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE intent_step SET intent_id = #{intentId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, belong_to_phase = #{belongToPhase}, priority = #{priority}, step_type = #{stepType}, prompt = #{prompt}, expected_inputs_json = #{expectedInputsJson}, validation_json = #{validationJson}, dependencies = #{dependencies}, can_skip = #{canSkip}, skip_to_prompt = #{skipToPrompt}, core_actions_json = #{coreActionsJson}, ocr_action = #{ocrAction}, is_direct_return = #{isDirectReturn} WHERE id = #{id}
